episode_event_salon_pasiosalon_date_ch00:
[Name:PlayerNickname ] earned
outstanding grades at Pasio Academy.
And then...
[Name:PlayerNickname ]! Congrats!

I heard you got good grades! Guess I
should study a little harder, huh?

Hey, you know what? When you have some
free time, we should celebrate!
Woo-hoo! I’m looking forward to it!

Back in Alola, we celebrate with parties.
They’re a lot of fun!

If it were up to me, I’d party every day! But
adults can be uptight about stuff like that.
I guess they need a reason to have fun.
That said...

Party planning is super exciting. I’d like to
try it!

OK, here’s what I’ll do—I’ll get lots of
yummy foods, and...

I also wanna get you a present,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!
Is there anything you’d like? You can tell me!

Really? Nothing in particular? No need to
hold back!

Then instead, how about we get something
to munch on and chat about our worries?

Lots of people have worries deep down—
even folks who seem cheerful on the outside!
Days later...

I got a bunch of malasadas and pancakes!
Let’s dig in and talk story!
Uh-huh... I see!

So...you’re not sure how to repay everyone
for the help they’ve given you?

So you DID have a worry or two,
[Name:PlayerNickname ].

But you know what? You’re super supportive
of everyone, too—including me!

You don’t have to worry about returning any
favors, really!
Back in Alola, I had some worries, too.

My gramps is an Island Kahuna, and I used
to get compared to him a lot.

That’s why I focused on enjoying Pokémon
battles, rather than winning them.

There was this one time I really wanted
to win...

but even though I went all out, I still lost!
I was so disappointed.

I didn’t know how to deal with that kind of
frustration, so I agonized over it for a while.

But then I went on an adventure with my
friends, and we overcame all sorts of
obstacles. That washed away all my doubts!

If you can’t figure something out on your
own...

I’m sure it’ll work out in the end as long as
you’ve got everyone by your side!

So, you know what? I think you’re fine as
you are, [Name:PlayerNickname ]!

Oh, about my worries... They’re a secret,
OK?
(Thank him for confiding in you.)
Hehe! We’ll keep it between us!

(Tell him it was surprising to hear he
had worries.)

Ahahaha! I could say the same about you,
[Name:PlayerNickname ]!

Eating together like we did today makes
food taste so much better.

And laughing with everyone makes your
worries shrink!

From now on, I’m sure we’ll be fine as long
as we stick together!
